creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
On Tue, 13 Jun 2000, Will Andrews wrote:
 >> CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--without-curses
 >> 
 >> to the ports makefile.
 > Gerald, would this be an acceptable solution until (at least) ncurses
 > is fixed in the base system ?
 
 Yes, that sounds fine. Compared to not being able to build that port
 on both 4-STABLE and 5-CURRENT, this is hardly, if at all, a loss of
 functionality. Would you mind testing that on one of your -STABLE boxes
 and installing it, if successful?
 
 Gerald
 
 PS: Of course I still do hope that the problem soon get's resolved at
 the root, i.e., ncurses.h.
 -- 
 Gerald "Jerry" pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at http://www.dbai.tuwien.ac.at/~pfeifer/
